adversarial.findings: RE-QA ROUND 2 (post-rework, contract amendments[1] / new verification[11]). 8 fresh adversarial probes run, all PASS, no defects found. (1) The Round-1 QA-blocking defect is confirmed RESOLVED: standard/GIP.md Section 1 ('Core Directive') now reads 'MUST inherit its governance content (`standard/`, `templates/`, `schema/`, `tools/`, and `NIZAM.json` -- the full payload defined authoritatively in Section 2, point 2)', naming the full payload and explicitly cross-referencing Section 2, no longer contradicting Sections 2/5.1. (2) A whole-file sweep across all FOUR deliverables (not just GIP.md) for any standard/+templates/+schema/-style enumeration found no stale or contradictory payload description anywhere: GIP.md's three live enumerations (lines 22, 59, 144) all now include tools/ and NIZAM.json; tools/interface.md, templates/README.md, and methodology/README.md contain no such enumeration at all. (3) H4 discovery-order semantics reconfirmed unregressed (file untouched this round). (4) H8's existing-repo section (5, 5.1, 5.2, 6) remains structurally intact and monotonically numbered after the Section-1 insertion shifted downstream line numbers -- no truncation or renumbering error introduced. (5) H6 de-leak rephrasings in templates/README.md and methodology/README.md remain at zero product_spec occurrences and continue to cite real, resolvable, meaning-preserving targets (standard/NDS.md Sec 2; root README.md 'Design Decisions' DD-1..DD-4). (6) C8/frontmatter integrity holds for all four files: each frontmatter block parses as valid YAML and each file's newest change_log entry's version matches its own frontmatter version; standard/GIP.md's rework updated only its existing 0.2.0 change_log summary text (no version re-bump), consistent with the coordinator's description and amendments[1]'s ratification. (7) Non-goals/scope guard: git diff HEAD (excluding .agent/) shows only the four contracted deliverables changed this round, and this round's rework touched only standard/GIP.md among them -- no CONTEXT.md, README.md, CHANGELOG.md, NIZAM.json, ADR, docs/guide/, schema/, feature_list, or product_spec_003.md change. (8) An independent 'bash tools/validate.sh' re-run exits 0 with the exact line 'SUMMARY: 8 passed, 0 failed'.

final_verdict.summary: All 12 contract-019 verification commands (including the new verification[11] generalized whole-file H5 completeness guard added by amendments[1]) were independently re-run from repo root and pass (12/12 EXIT:0). The Round-1 adversarial finding -- standard/GIP.md Section 1 still asserting the stale 3-directory governance-content payload, contradicting the corrected Section 2 item 2 and Section 5.1 -- is confirmed resolved: Section 1 now names the full 4-dir + NIZAM.json payload and explicitly cross-references Section 2. A fresh, broader Round-2 adversarial spot-check (8 probes) covering all four deliverables found no other remaining contradiction, stale claim, dangling prose, broken cross-reference, or non-goal violation. Frontmatter/change_log integrity holds across all four files, and an independent 'bash tools/validate.sh' re-run is green (8/8, exit 0). QA verdict: PASS.
